cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking for the date 24 hours after September 9, 1909, in the format MM/DD/YYYY. The options are given, so I need to figure out which one is correct. First, 24 hours later from any given date is just the next day. Since the time is 24 hours later, that means exactly one full day has passed. So the date should be the next day after September 9, 1909. Now, what is the next day after September 9, 1909? Well, September has 30 days. So the day after September 9 is September 10. That would make the date 09/10/1909. Looking at the options, option A is 09/10/1909. So the correct answer should be A. Let me double-check. If today is September 9, then adding one day would be September 10. 24 hours later is one full day, so the date should be the next day. September 10. The other options don't make sense. For example, option B is September 24, which is 15 days later. Option C is July 3, which is months earlier. D is December 10, also months later,
